creator: zhoushuqun@gmail.com
text:
Commit it please, thanks.

On Mon, Feb 13, 2012 at 8:11 AM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of www/xpi-yslow,
>
> Please note that PR ports/165073 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/165073
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
